host().details: Should return the `Host` address for the current chain. The `Host` is an immutable contract that will never change.

onGetResponse((((bytes,bytes,uint64,byte.details: Called by the Host when a response is received for a previously dispatched GET request. Override this method to process the retrieved state data. The default implementation reverts.

onGetTimeout(((bytes,bytes,uint64,bytes,.details: Called by the Host when a previously dispatched GET request has timed out. Override this method to handle GET timeout scenarios. The default implementation reverts.

onPostRequestTimeout(((bytes,bytes,uint6.details: Called by the Host when a previously dispatched POST request has timed out. Override this method to implement cleanup or retry logic. The default implementation reverts.

quote((bytes,bytes,bytes,uint64,uint256,.details: returns the quoted fee in the native token for dispatching a POST request

quote((bytes,uint64,bytes[],uint64,uint2.details: returns the quoted fee in the native token for dispatching a GET request
